description: Format PowerShell scripts and modules (.ps1, .psm1, .psd1) with comprehensive code formatting options
configuration.title: Ark Format: PowerShell
config.indentStyle.description: Use spaces or tabs for indentation
config.maxConsecutiveBlankLines.descript: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines
config.removeLeadingBlankLines.descripti: Remove blank lines at the beginning of the file
config.insertFinalNewline.description: Insert a newline at the end of the file
config.lineEnding.description: Line ending style (LF, CRLF, or Auto-detect)
config.collapseSpaces.description: Collapse multiple spaces into one (outside of strings and alignment contexts)
config.rangeFormatting.reindent.descript: Re-indent selected range (uses document context to calculate base indent)
config.rangeFormatting.useDocumentContex: When re-indenting a range, pre-scan lines before the selection to compute the correct base indent level
